With a combination of modern amenities, strategic location, and future appreciation potential, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity for both end-users and investors.

resultList.dtldesc: Spacious 3 BHK Builder Floor for Sale in Dwarka Mor, New DelhiPresenting a well-located and ready-to-move builder floor apartment in Dwarka Mor, New Delhi. Positioned close to Dwarka Metro Station and surrounded by essential urban conveniences, this property offers practical living space combined with strong connectivity in West Delhi.Property SpecificationsSituated on the third floor of a four-storey building comprising eight units, this resale builder floor features a super built-up area of approximately 1100 sq. ft. The layout includes three well-proportioned bedrooms and three bathrooms, making it suitable for mid-sized families seeking comfort and functionality.The living and dining areas are designed in a combined configuration, creating an open and versatile space for everyday family activities and social gatherings. One covered and one open parking space are available, offering convenient vehicle accommodation. CCTV surveillance is present within the building premises, contributing to security. The low-rise structure maintains a private residential environment without lift access.LocalityDwarka Mor is a well-developed residential and commercial neighbourhood with excellent public transport connectivity. The metro station is located approximately 300 metres from the property, while local markets are within walking distance. Schools are situated around 500 metres away, and hospitals are accessible within roughly 2 kilometres.With its spacious layout, proximity to metro connectivity, and practical amenities, this 3 BHK builder floor presents a valuable ownership opportunity in New Delhi.

Metro connectivity is approximately 15 minutes away, ensuring seamless access to Delhi and other parts of Gurgaon. This residence is ideally suited for families and professionals seeking spacious, premium low-rise living in a well-connected and rapidly appreciating corridor.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience a grand and sophisticated lifestyle with this premium residential apartment available for sale in VVIP Addresses, situated in the thriving neighbourhood of Raj Nagar Extension, Ghaziabad. Superbly crafted to provide an upscale urban living experience, this ready-to-move-in residence perfectly combines expansive interiors with a world-class community environment, making it an exceptional choice for large families.::::Property Specifications::This thoughtfully planned apartment features a generous super area of 2625 sq. ft and is positioned on the 9th floor of a well-designed 14-storey residential tower. The accommodation comprises four spacious and airy bedrooms along with five well-appointed bathrooms, ensuring ample privacy and comfort for every family member. The flat is semi-furnished, offering high-quality basic fittings while allowing buyers the flexibility to customise the final decor according to their personal style preferences. Available through resale, the property stands ready for immediate occupancy.::::Facilities::The development resides on a massive 25-acre campus and features an array of sports, leisure, and essential amenities. Residents have access to a fully equipped clubhouse, a swimming pool, a modern gymnasium, and unique indoor squash and badminton courts. The estate boasts vast open green spaces, a children's play area, a dedicated jogging and strolling track, and multipurpose courts. Essential infrastructure includes reserved parking, multiple elevators, a reliable rainwater harvesting system, an earthquake-resistant design, a waste disposal layout, intercom facilities, and a fire-fighting setup. The complex ensures complete peace of mind with continuous power backup, an efficient maintenance staff, and a robust 24/7 security team integrated with CCTV surveillance.::::Locality::Located in the prominent locality of Raj Nagar Extension, the property benefits from excellent connectivity and immediate proximity to essential civic infrastructure. Families will appreciate the convenience of having quality educational institutions nearby, with Sanfort International School situated just 3.4 km from the project. Daily commercial requirements, dining, and leisure are easily fulfilled, with Garden Fast Food and various retail centres located within a short 0.6 km distance. The neighborhood is seamlessly connected to the wider Delhi NCR region, with an abundance of public transport options available for an effortless daily commute.
